calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Vacated

Defendant And Cross-Plainitff Levin Simes Abrams Llp'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar May-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT/Cross-Plaintiff LEVIN SIMES ABRAMS LLP's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents.

DEFENDANT AND CROSS-PLAINTIFF, LEVIN SIMES ABRAMS LLP'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "LSA") MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTIONS OF DOCUMENTS, REQUEST NO. 7 FROM PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT, CORNISH & CARY COMMERCIAL (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "C&C") IS GRANTED, LIMITED TO ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS RELATING TO DISPUTES OVER SIMILAR CONTRACT PROVISIONS. WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANT A VERIFIED RESPONSE TO REQUESTS NO. 7 AND DELIVER ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS AS LIMITED ABOVE. TO THE EXTENT THAT PLAINTIFF IS WITHHOLDING ANY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENT ON THE GROUNDS OF A/C PRIVILEGE, IT WILL IDENTIFY EACH DOCUMENT WITH SUFFICIENT SPECIFICITY TO ENABLE DEFENDANT TO CHALLENGE THE A/C CLAIM.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
